description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 18 hrs 38 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 3 hrs 6 mins. His tracked language use was mostly Java (37%), followed by Other (33%), Markdown (16%), and TypeScript (6%). The JSON does not list any GitHub commits, repos, PRs, or new repos for the week.
